findings.title: Duplicate object-key formatting logic for protobuf keys
findings.impact: The new protobuf overload repeats the same truncation, count, and total-size logic as the vector overload above it. Any future change to access-log key formatting will need to be kept in sync across both implementations, which is easy to miss in this hot logging utility.
findings.fix: Factor the shared loop into a small helper that accepts an iterable/range of string-like keys, or have both overloads adapt their input into a common formatting function.

findings.title: Sampler flag name set is duplicated across update paths
findings.impact: The same three sampler flag names are declared here and again in UpdateFlagParameter. Adding, renaming, or removing a sampler flag later requires multiple edits and can silently split validation from dispatch behavior if one list is missed.
findings.fix: Move the sampler flag names into one file-local constant or helper such as IsSamplerFlag(), and reuse it from both ValidateAndCommitSamplerFlags and UpdateFlagParameter.

findings.title: Comment relies on a brittle design-document line reference
findings.impact: The zero-rate branch documents its invariant as 'hard per design 533', but line-number references will drift as the design doc changes and do not explain the local reason a reject decision must not be created here. Future maintainers will have to chase external context before safely modifying this branch.
findings.fix: Replace the line-number reference with a short source-local rationale describing which path owns reject-decision creation/propagation and why this branch must remain read-only.
